zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Umfraville於1391年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德哈波特爾時，她的父親Thomas Umfraville30歲，母親Agnes Grey27歲。她於1423年4月與Sir John Constable III結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1444年6月23日在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Umfraville于1391年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德哈波特爾时，她的父亲Thomas Umfraville30岁，母亲Agnes Grey27岁。她于1423年4月与Sir John Constable III结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1444年6月23日在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆享年53岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Umfraville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Umfreville (La Manche) or Offranville (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Umfraville was born in 1391, in Harbottle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Umfraville, was 30 and her mother, Agnes Grey, was 27. She married Sir John Constable III in April 1423. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 23 June 1444, in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Umfraville est née en 1391, à Harbottle, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Umfraville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes Grey, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Constable III en avril 1423. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1444, à Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Umfraville 1391 in Harbottle, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Umfraville 30 und ihre Mutter Agnes Grey 27. Sie hat im April 1423 Sir John Constable III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1444 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Constable III nel aprile 1423. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1444, nel Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Umfravilleが1391年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドハーボットルで生まれた時，父Thomas Umfravilleは30歳，母Agnes Greyは27歳であった。1423年4月にSir John Constable IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1444年6月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルシャムで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルシャムにて埋葬された。

ko.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Umfraville(이)가 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 하르벗틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Umfraville(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Grey(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1423년 4월 Sir John Constable III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1444년 6월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤에 묻혔다.

ru.Halsham, Yorkshire, England: холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Umfraville родилась в 1391 г. в местности харботтл, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Umfraville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Grey, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Constable III апрель 1423 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 23 июня 1444 г. в местности холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания.
